raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "wakee pee winna/ Karsenus/
Setars/ Adnatus/ Tarsis/
Meres/ Marsenus/ Memukans/
feptini Leeli-Kungi to Perseu
un Meederu/ kas ta Kehnixa
Breekscha btja/ un fehdeja ang-
stakâ Weeta eekch Walstibas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ko ar to Kehnixinni Wa-
sti bijz tahs Teesas darriht/
tapehz ka ta ne bij darrijsi ta Keh-
nixa Aäswerufa Wahrdn/ kas
taur teem Kambar-Junkureem
winrai stahsthts btja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Memukans
preeksch ta Kehnina nn teem Lee-
leem-Rungeem : Ta Kehnixinne
Wasti ne irr ween prett to Keh-
nizu noseegnfees/ bet arri prett
wiffeem Leeleem-Rungeem un
prett wiffeem Laudim/ kas wif-
fäs Walstis ta Kehnixa Aasive-
rufa dshwo.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tcht Leeta tahs Kehni-
nines tspaudihs pee wiffahn
Seewahin/ un tahs nizzinahs
fawus Wihrus pee fewis/ un
fazzihsta : TasKehnisch Aäswer-
rus pawehleja/ ka ta Kehnixin-
ne Westi taptu preeksch winna
westa/ bet winna ne nahje.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tanni patcha Deend faz-
zths to Perseu un Meederu Leel-
Rungu Gaspaschas us wiffeem
ta Kehnina Leeleem-Rungeem/
kad tee scho Leetu tahs Kehnixin-
nes dsirdehs/ un tad buhs Niz-
zinafchanas un Dufinoschanas
papillam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ja tas tam Kehninam
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kehnixa Bauslis iseet/ un
tobp raksthts eekch to Meed
un Perseu Bauslibahm/ ka
pahrkahpts ne tobp/ ka tai
sti ne buhs wairs preeksch to
niku Aäswerufu nahkt/ un
tas Kehnisch winnas Wal-
zittai dohd/ kas labbaka irr/
ka winna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad ta Kehnixa B-
lis/ kas zaur wiffu winna W-
stibu irr jasuhhta/ (jo ta irr
la) taps dsirdehts/ tad tur
wiffas Gaspaschas sawus K-
gus Gohda/ starp Augsteen-
Semmeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Wahrdn pa-
tain Kehntnam un Leeleem-
geem/ un tas Kehnisch da-
pehz Memukana Wahrdn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad tappe Grahm-
suhtitas wiffas Kehnixa
stis/ us ikweenn Walstibu
fawas Wallodas/ un us if
reem Laudim pehz fawas
les/ ka ikkatrs Wihrs par
vitaju buhtu fawa Namma-
likke runnaht pehz fawu Lau-
Wallodas.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
